duplicates.name: play
duplicates.recommendation: Keep until shell icon policy distinguishes toolbar, action, and activity roles.

duplicates.name: folder
duplicates.recommendation: Keep Ionicons legacy isolated and prefer explicit open or closed names in new packs.

duplicates.name: save
duplicates.recommendation: Do not replace until UI wiring policy is approved.

duplicates.name: add
duplicates.recommendation: Do not replace until UI wiring policy is approved.

duplicates.name: status names
duplicates.recommendation: Maintain visual consistency when either pack is wired.

backlog.title: Keep audit manifest synchronized
backlog.reason: Future asset additions can make counts stale.
backlog.recommended_action: Update both files whenever audited SVG scopes change.

backlog.title: Preserve generated SVG integrity checks
backlog.reason: External refs or non-ASCII content would weaken asset portability.
backlog.recommended_action: Rerun Grep scans during future asset-generation tasks.

backlog.title: Define pack naming collision policy
backlog.reason: Generic names are safe only with pack-qualified lookup.
backlog.recommended_action: Document whether consumers must address icons by pack, category, and name.

backlog.title: Decide Ionicons replacement policy
backlog.reason: Existing Ionicons are wired while generated replacements are asset-only.
backlog.recommended_action: Approve per-view replacement criteria before changing UI references.

backlog.title: Add machine validation for pack counts
backlog.reason: Manual counts are easy to drift.
backlog.recommended_action: Add a future non-build validation script if this audit becomes recurring.

backlog.title: Wire generated editor shell icons
backlog.reason: Generated shell assets are ready but unused.
backlog.recommended_action: Map retained-host icon roles to shell pack names in a later UI plan.

backlog.title: Expand future domain icon families
backlog.reason: Current catalog omits detailed states for import, build, plugin, profiler, and debug overlays.
backlog.recommended_action: Generate targeted state icons after UI requirements are fixed.

backlog.title: Extend Hub cloud and team states
backlog.reason: Hub has base cloud/team nav icons but not status variants.
backlog.recommended_action: Add state-specific icons when Hub feature screens require them.

validation.evidence: Fresh Glob returned 44 Hub SVG paths, matching pack total 44.
Fresh Glob output aligns with supplied pack total 142 for editor icons.
Fresh Glob returned 1 preview SVG path.
Pack counts sum to 187 and match Hub 44 + editor icons 142 + preview 1.
Grep pattern href=|url\(http|https://|<image returned no matches for all three audited roots.
Grep pattern [^\x00-\x7F] returned no matches for each generated Zircon-owned scope.
